## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Security/privacy
- [ ] Refactor

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run lint`
- [ ] I ran `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] I ran `npm run test`
- [ ] I ran `npm run build`
- [ ] I did not commit secrets
- [ ] I did not include real guest data or PII
- [ ] I updated documentation if needed
- [ ] I kept legal/compliance claims cautious
